title: Faithful retrain skeleton smoke
hypothesis: Text-only training-pipeline smoke: harness runs end-to-end on tiny config, sub-01 s01e01/s01e02, 1 seed, --tiny-model, --limit-train-batches 1, text feature only
command_template: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 PYTHONPATH=. ./venv/bin/python experiments/tribe_faithful_retrain.py --subjects sub-01 --episodes s01e01 s01e02 --seeds 33 --tiny-model --limit-train-batches 1 --features-to-use text
gate: tests pass and training-step output shape (n_TRs, 1000) finite for text-only path
notes: Downgraded from full-modality after S0053 blocked on cold video extraction (~2h projected). Text-only smoke passed in S0054 after config-hash serialization fix; multimodal path remains in H001-SM after H000-VCACHE-SM cache warmup.

title: Cold multimodal feature cache for smoke chunks
hypothesis: One-time cold extraction of text/audio/video features for sub-01 s01e01 and s01e02 under feature_cache_version=h001_faithful_retrain_v1. Warms the cache so downstream multimodal smokes fit budget.
command_template: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 PYTHONPATH=. ./venv/bin/python experiments/tribe_faithful_retrain.py --subjects sub-01 --episodes s01e01 s01e02 --seeds 33 --tiny-model --limit-train-batches 1 --features-to-use text audio video
gate: all per-modality feature cache files materialized for the two episodes; one finite (n_TRs, 1000) training-step output
notes: Setup row, not a hypothesis. The 2x budget ceiling is 8h. If it breaches, narrow chunk scope (one episode) and rerun; if still breaches, drop video and surface for human review.

title: Multimodal training-pipeline smoke (warm cache)
hypothesis: Harness runs end-to-end with text+audio+video on warm cache, sub-01 s01e01/s01e02, 1 seed, --tiny-model, --limit-train-batches 1.
command_template: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 PYTHONPATH=. ./venv/bin/python experiments/tribe_faithful_retrain.py --subjects sub-01 --episodes s01e01 s01e02 --seeds 33 --tiny-model --limit-train-batches 1 --features-to-use text audio video
gate: warm cache reused (no cold video extraction); training-step output shape (n_TRs, 1000) finite for full-modality path
notes: Validates the multimodal path now that the cache is warm. If cold video extraction reappears, the cache key drifted; fix cache key before retrying.

title: Faithful retrain exploratory, sub-01 Friends s01 e01-e12
hypothesis: Faithful retrain with default model on episode-heldout val e11/e12 reproduces order of public TRIBE on the proxy
command_template: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 python experiments/tribe_faithful_retrain.py --subjects sub-01 --episodes s01e01..s01e12 --val-episodes s01e11 s01e12 --seeds 33 34 35
gate: delta_to_public_tribe_average_head within +/- 0.02
notes: Establishes "our retrain ~= public weights" on the proxy. Required gate before any architecture claim. Now depends on H001-SM (multimodal warm-cache smoke). Will also require H000-VCACHE-E for s01e03..s01e12 cache warmup before running; add that row when H001-SM clears.

title: Faithful retrain 4-subject Friends S1-S6
hypothesis: Retrain over sub-01/02/03/05 Friends S1-S6 episode-heldout, default model, 3 seeds
command_template: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 python experiments/tribe_faithful_retrain.py --subjects sub-01 sub-02 sub-03 sub-05 --seasons s01..s06 --val-policy episode-heldout --seeds 33 34 35
gate: delta_to_public_tribe_average_head >= -0.005
notes: Our scaled baseline. Comparator for all architecture/feature changes from here.

title: Faithful retrain on full multi-study mix
hypothesis: Retrain over Algonauts + Lahner + Lebel + Wen, 4-subject readouts on Algonauts subjects
command_template: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 python experiments/tribe_faithful_retrain.py --studies algonauts2025 lahner2024bold lebel2023bold wen2017 --subjects sub-01 sub-02 sub-03 sub-05 --seeds 33 34 35
gate: delta_to_public_tribe_average_head >= -0.005
notes: Required for any architecture/feature claim at the paper's scale.

title: V-JEPA-2 feature extraction smoke
hypothesis: V-JEPA-2 extracts and caches video features matching expected per-timestep shape
command_template: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 python experiments/feature_extract_vjepa2.py --chunks s01e01a --check-dims
gate: dims = (T, D) finite
notes: Dim/shape only; no training. Caches into cache/features_v2/vjepa2/.

title: InternVideo2 feature extraction smoke
hypothesis: InternVideo2 extracts and caches video features
command_template: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 python experiments/feature_extract_internvideo2.py --chunks s01e01a --check-dims
gate: dims = (T, D) finite

title: BEATs audio feature extraction smoke
hypothesis: BEATs caches audio features per chunk
command_template: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 python experiments/feature_extract_beats.py --chunks s01e01a --check-dims
gate: dims = (T, D) finite

title: Audio-MAE feature extraction smoke
hypothesis: Audio-MAE caches audio features per chunk
command_template: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 python experiments/feature_extract_audio_mae.py --chunks s01e01a --check-dims
gate: dims = (T, D) finite

title: VLM hidden-state feature extraction smoke
hypothesis: Qwen2-VL hidden states extracted on one chunk; cache size and dim documented
command_template: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 python experiments/feature_extract_vlm_hidden_states.py --vlm qwen2-vl-7b-instruct --chunks s01e01a --layers last --check-dims
gate: dims = (T, D) finite; cache_size_mb logged
notes: Likely slowest extractor. Validate cache size before scale-up.

title: Contrastive-aligned feature extraction smoke
hypothesis: ImageBind-style projection of text+audio+video into shared D
command_template: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 python experiments/feature_extract_contrastive_aligned.py --chunks s01e01a --check-dims
gate: dims = (T, D) finite

title: HRF basis fit smoke
hypothesis: Canonical HRF + temporal derivative basis fits on existing public-TRIBE prediction arrays
command_template: python experiments/tribe_hrf_basis_ablation.py --basis canonical_plus_deriv --subjects sub-01 --episodes s01e01a --check-shapes
gate: (n_TRs, 1000) finite
notes: No training; operates on cached predictions.

title: Subject-LoRA injection smoke
hypothesis: LoRA rank-8 adapters wrap transformer linears; one forward+backward succeeds; subject param counts logged
command_template: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 python experiments/tribe_subject_lora.py --subjects sub-01 --episodes s01e01 --lora-rank 8 --tiny-model --limit-train-batches 1
gate: finite gradients per subject

title: FiLM subject conditioning smoke
hypothesis: Subject-conditional LN gamma/beta integrated; one forward+backward; identity check at zero-init
command_template: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 python experiments/tribe_film_subject.py --subjects sub-01 --episodes s01e01 --tiny-model --limit-train-batches 1
gate: max abs diff from baseline forward < 1e-5

title: Hypernetwork readout smoke
hypothesis: Subject-embedding -> readout matrix generation runs and matches expected output shape
command_template: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 python experiments/tribe_subject_hypernet.py --subjects sub-01 --episodes s01e01 --tiny-model --limit-train-batches 1

title: Subject-embedding-token smoke
hypothesis: Prepended subject token participates in attention; ablation of token reduces subject discriminability
command_template: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 python experiments/tribe_subject_token.py --subjects sub-01 sub-02 --episodes s01e01 --tiny-model --limit-train-batches 1

title: Cross-modal combiner smoke
hypothesis: Replace MLP combiner with stacked cross-attention blocks; forward+backward succeeds; param count documented
command_template: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 python experiments/tribe_cross_modal_combiner.py --subjects sub-01 --episodes s01e01 --tiny-model --limit-train-batches 1 --cross-attn-depth 2

title: Dual-stream (per-modality + VLM) smoke
hypothesis: Combiner accepts both legacy three-stream features and VLM hidden states; gradient flows through both
command_template: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 python experiments/tribe_dual_stream.py --subjects sub-01 --episodes s01e01 --tiny-model --limit-train-batches 1

title: Learned text per-layer weights smoke
hypothesis: Replace frozen-mean over Llama layers with learned softmax weights
command_template: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 python experiments/text_layer_weights_ablation.py --subjects sub-01 --episodes s01e01 --tiny-model --limit-train-batches 1

title: Llama-3.3-8B text features smoke
hypothesis: Larger backbone caches and produces (L, D) text features within VRAM budget

command_template: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 python experiments/tribe_masked_vertex_pretrain.py --subjects sub-01 sub-02 sub-03 sub-05 --pretrain-epochs 5 --finetune-epochs 5 --seeds 33 34 35

title: 5-seed ensemble of H003
hypothesis: Average predictions across 5 H003 seeds at inference
command_template: python experiments/tribe_seed_ensemble.py --base-checkpoints results/H003-seed{33,34,35,36,37} --subjects sub-01 sub-02 sub-03 sub-05 --val-episodes s01e11 s01e12
gate: mean delta >= +0.005 vs single-seed H003, non-negative per subject
notes: Two extra seeds (36, 37) of H003 needed first; add as separate queue items once H003 lands.

title: Test-time augmentation
hypothesis: Average predictions over +/- 1 TR crops and per-modality dropouts
command_template: python experiments/tribe_tta_eval.py --checkpoint results/H003-seed33 --subjects sub-01 sub-02 sub-03 sub-05 --tta crops dropouts
gate: mean delta >= +0.005 vs no-TTA, non-negative per subject

title: Subject-ridge calibration replication on H003
hypothesis: Replicate +0.04 subject-ridge result on top of OUR retrained head, not public weights
command_template: PYTHONPATH=. CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 python experiments/tribe_native_tr_subject_adaptation.py --base-predictions results/H003 --subjects sub-01 sub-02 sub-03 sub-05
gate: mean delta >= +0.01 vs raw H003, all subjects positive

title: Paired official-format submission (raw retrain + best candidate)
hypothesis: Produce raw H003 and best-confirmatory-winner submissions across all available Friends S7 and OOD stimuli
command_template: PYTHONPATH=. CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 python experiments/predict_tribe_algonauts_submission.py --base-checkpoint results/H003 --candidate-checkpoint results/<winner> --stimuli friends-s7 ood --subjects sub-01 sub-02 sub-03 sub-05
gate: all artifacts (n_TRs, 1000) finite; manifests document provenance and no hidden-label access
notes: Final pre-Codabench gate. Submit to Codabench manually after this clears.
